description: As a remote sensing technician preparing satellite imagery for an urban planning department, enhance the Sentinel-2 true color imagery (sentinel2_tci.tif) in SNAP Desktop to improve discrimination of built structures and linear infrastructure. Apply spatial filtering to sharpen edges and highlight structural boundaries while preserving the original unfiltered bands. Save the product in BEAM-DIMAP format and export the GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/.

metadata.data_source: Copernicus Sentinel-2 L2A TCI from AWS COGs
